title: Dont Worry Be Happy Lyrics Nimirndhu Nil Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Dont Worry Be Happy
Singer(s): Gaana Bala
Lyrics: Gaana Bala
MOvie: Nimirndhu Nil
Music: GV Prakash

Vazhka oru veri pidicha kazhudha machi
munnaid pona kadikudhu
pinnadi pona udhaikudhu cha..

Dont worry be happy.
Idho vantaaruppa dolakku

Kozhi sandakellaam courtu-kellaam ponaalum.
kolandha porandha pinnay
konjam azhagu koranjaalum.
Aadi maasam manaivi amma veetuku ponaalum.
adutha maasam unnaku
panjaayatha vachaalum.

dont worry dont worry be happy
dont worry dont worry be happy

Adagu vacha porulu elathula ponaalum.
Adhuku nee sariyillanu
yelanamaa sonnaalum.
Koratta vittadhuku diverse thaan ketaalum.
Kozhambula uppu illanu
purusan unna thittinaalum.
Kiss adicha paiyyan vera
ponnu kooda ponaalum.
KIss adicha unna pottu
petti case-u pottaalum.

Pathaam class-u nallaa padichi
failu thaaney aanaalum.
Power star-u vandhu kooda
current-u cut aanaalum.

dont worry dont worry be happy
dont worry dont worry be happy

Veettoda maapulanu kevalamaa sonnaalum.
Veppaati pecha ketu
purusan unna adichaalum.
Aathula pora thanniya yaarum
mondhu kudichaalum.
Veetula moonu vela thandasoru thinnaalum.

Onnumilla matter-uku ooru
serndhu adichaalum.
CHumma suthuna paavathuku
thaali katta sonnaalum.
Thaali kattum nerathula
ponnu kaanaam ponaalum.
Pension vaangura anti unna
tension-u thaan pannaalum.

dont worry dont worry be happy
dont worry dont worry be happy

Kozhi sandakellaam courtu-kellaam ponaalum.
kolandha porandha pinnay
konjam azhagu koranjaalum.
Aadi maasam manaivi amma veetuku ponaalum.
adutha maasam unnaku
panjaayatha vachaalum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Dont Worry Be Happy conveys a message of positivity and encourages listeners to stay cheerful despite life's challenges.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Nimirndhu Nil, the song reflects the protagonist's journey towards embracing life and overcoming obstacles with a smile.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

Dont Worry Be Happy was released on December 12, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Dont Worry Be Happy from Nimirndhu Nil encapsulates a carefree spirit, urging listeners to embrace happiness amidst life's ups and downs. With its upbeat tempo and cheerful lyrics, it serves as a reminder to focus on the positive aspects of life. The vibrant energy of Gaana Bala's voice, combined with GV PrakashKumar's catchy composition, creates an infectious vibe that resonates with audiences. This track is perfect for celebrations and moments when you need a boost of joy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to embrace positivity with Dont Worry Be Happy from the movie Nimirndhu Nil. This vibrant track, sung and penned by the talented Gaana Bala, is a perfect blend of uplifting beats and catchy lyrics that will instantly brighten your mood. With GV PrakashKumar's exceptional music, this song is a celebration of life that you can't miss!
stanzaMeanings: Life is like a donkey that has caught a disease, it goes ahead and then falls behind.
Don't worry, be happy. Here comes the music.

Even if the chicken and the goat go away, even if the child is born with a little beauty, when the wife goes to her mother's house in the first month, next month you will have to manage your expenses.
Don't worry, don't worry, be happy. Don't worry, don't worry, be happy.

Even if everything goes wrong, even if you say you are not okay, even if you lose your temper, even if a man hits you for not having salt in the food, even if a boy kisses a girl and she goes away, even if you get a case for kissing you.
Even if you study well in the tenth grade and still fail, even if the power star comes, the current will still be cut off.
Don't worry, don't worry, be happy. Don't worry, don't worry, be happy.
Even if the neighbors say something bad, even if a man hits you for listening to gossip, even if someone drinks water in the house, even if three people eat together at home.

Even if nothing matters, even if you get hit by the village, even if you say to tie the knot for fun, even if you don't see the girl when tying the knot, the tension of getting a pension will cause you stress.
Don't worry, don't worry, be happy. Don't worry, don't worry, be happy.

Even if the chicken and the goat go away, even if the child is born with a little beauty, when the wife goes to her mother's house in the first month, next month you will have to manage your expenses.
Don't worry, don't worry, be happy. Don't worry, don't worry, be happy.
